title: SEC-101 Postmortem: Spear-Phishing to Lateral Movement Chain
body: Full postmortem for SEC-101. Attack chain: spear-phishing email → credential dump via lsass.exe → Pass-the-Hash lateral movement to HR database. Timeline: 8h from phish to lateral movement. Lessons: enable MFA for all privileged accounts, deploy credential guard, add detection rule DET-2026-031.
